full_text:
Li Li (Jianxian) 李立 (建賢)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Li (李立), styledJianxian (建賢), was born in Zhuo commandery. Appointed as Inspector of Jing after Liu Cong’s surrender. Li Li was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Wei Kingdom.
